title: Lunara Silver Reel repurpose pack: reframe one product-showcase clip to 9:16 / 1:1 / 16:9, AI sizzle cutdown, cleaned founder VO, caption sheet + vectorized wordmark end-card asset
one_line_ask: Take Lunara Silver's one raw vertical pendant-showcase clip, raw founder voiceover, product hero still, and flat wordmark PNG, and repurpose them into a platform pack: 9:16 / 1:1 / 16:9 reframes of the clip (same runtime), an AI sizzle cutdown for the Meta ad, a cleaned founder VO, a caption/scheduling sheet, and a graded end-card still with a vectorized wordmark.

issues: Background is a checkerboard pattern indicating transparency, which is acceptable for a source asset but not a true alpha channel preview; however, this is standard for showing transparency in previews.
Crescent moon glyph is correctly placed over the 'A', but the moon shape is slightly off-center relative to the 'A' apex, which may require minor adjustment in final design.
Crescent moon glyph is positioned above the 'A' but slightly closer to the 'N/A' junction rather than perfectly centered over the apex of the 'A' — minor alignment nuance for designer to finalize
Canvas appears wider than 2400x700 ratio (image reads as roughly square crop), though this may be a preview artifact
Very subtle shadow/drop beneath the text block visible — near-white bg artifact, acceptable as source file
Pendant charm is very slightly large relative to chain gauge (minor proportion quibble)
Crescent moon relief could read as slightly over-darkened in the recess, reducing micro-detail legibility at thumbnail scale
Dried botanicals in background are marginally more in-focus than ideal for a soft-prop treatment, could compete slightly with subject at small sizes

assets.name: product_reel_moonlit_raw.mp4

issues: Chain and secondary pendant slightly out of focus at bottom of frame, but consistent with shallow depth of field in handheld video

assets.note: Seedance 2.0 t2v (latest, best quality) — migrated from 1.0-pro i2v; brand-clean + scene-correct (handcrafted crescent-moon/mountains pendant, no real logos); silent raw clip (task audio comes from the separate VO track).
